calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-12-2010 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-27-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gregory O'Keeffe for and with Gary Leporis (Petitioner).

Mr. Gregory stated that he had not heard from anyone, and that the found document and declaration from Mr. Wright was all they had. The Court granted the petition (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
